description: Composing preset that renders a sortable risk table + a likelihood × impact quadrant grid from one source

attributes.name: src
attributes.description: URL to JSON [{ id, title, likelihood, impact, owner, mitigation }]

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Optional heading shown above the layout

structure.description: Inline data source: <tr> rows with cells [Title, Likelihood, Impact, Owner, Mitigation]

events.name: risk-register:ready
events.description: Fired after the table + grid render
